creator: gurney_j@efn.org
text:
I was the one that housed it at metriclient-2.uoregon.edu, which was
actually a wireless Ricochet link...   I have bought the domain
funkthat.com so it will now be housed at ftp.funkthat.com as long as
I have a stable net connection for my server...

so, if someone wants we can revive this port...

--
